name: pptx-skill
description: Open-source PowerPoint skill and PPTX skill for Codex agents that build, edit, and QA polished presentations, slides, and slide decks.

scripts.check:python: python3 -m py_compile scripts/generate_openai_image.py scripts/asset_stage.py scripts/build_workspace.py scripts/init_deck_workspace.py scripts/preflight.py scripts/build_deck.py scripts/layout_lint.py scripts/render_slides.py scripts/render_mermaid.py scripts/design_rules_qa.py scripts/validate_planning.py scripts/verify_narration.py
